response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify scenes based on song performances and outfit/visual changes. 2. Identified 'Agape' and 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' as the performed songs. 3. Used the search tool to find the original composer and full lyrics for both songs, following the rules (no quotes, original language). 4. Constructed the JSON response with the metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features two VTubers performing live. They first sing 'Agape', followed by a performance of 'Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous' (トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ) after a small transition.

scenes.description: The video starts with two VTubers, AZKi and another performer, singing 'Agape'. They are on a stage with a digital heart background. 'Music:' credited to nao'ymt.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I was looking at the backs of people who had passed by
I'm no longer that person
I was forcing myself to find the meaning of being all alone
I'm no longer that person

The clouds are clearing
When did I forget?
I held back my tears
Thinking I had become strong
What was I thinking about so complicatedly?
If anxiety covers the sun
Remember
Because I love you
Even if we are apart
I will continue to sing the song
Of the saved smile, one I won't erase
I won't regret anything
When I wish, "Please"
The withered bud opens
That is agape

I have never defiled your kindness
Or the tears that spilled
If being correct hurts others
There is no tomorrow there
This fire you lit
Will endlessly illuminate someone's heart
Just as a limited life
Melts into unlimited love
And returns to the earth
Until that time

Because I love you
Even if we are apart
I will continue to sing the song
Of the saved smile, one I won't erase
I won't regret anything
When I wish, "Please"
The withered bud opens
That is agape

Even if the color of the sky is different
I'm sure we are connected
That's fine
I will walk straight ahead

Because I love you
Even if I cannot be by your side
I will continue to sing the song
Of the saved smile, one I won't erase
I won't regret anything
When I wish, "Please"
The withered bud opens
That is agape

Because I love you
No matter how far away we are
Because I love you
No matter how far away we are

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Denpa tempo up and I'm sensationally electrocuted!
Is there something you want to forget, something sad, too?
I don't know, but if you're crying over a movie you don't even know, it's just because you lack drama.
You're always thinking about foolish, trivial things.
If the rain clears up, your love and your profile will probably belong to someone else, right?
Fake foundation is all for tonight.

But why, oh why, oh why?
How far will the unstable lantern go?
You've thrown everything away now
It's not a joke.
Tokyo Shandy Rendezvous
Even if that time comes, it won't do anything.
Vague truths just make me melancholic.
Take me, take on me.

Ha.

And my appetite for them won't budge.
Even if I let my intangible feelings go,
There's no strategy, but why?
Ah, I'm already tired of it.
